title: dryopteris ovata var. harperi
intro: Dryopteris ovata var. harperi, also known as Harper's shield fern, is a rare and distinctive variety of the Dryopteris ovata species, which is a type of fern native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris ovata var. harperi include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies and supplements.
